type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In late 2018 we had a change in hog fuel supplier. We decided to resample the ash so as to update our pollutant release estimation assumptions. For the 2019 report, ash samples were taken from the ash bin directly (collects ash from hogfuel gasifier and ESP) and sent for elemental analysis. The limitation of this is that the ash bin isnt perfectly mixed. For 2020 report, we took the ash samples directly from each conveyor (1 from ESP and another from gasifier), then weighted the results based on ash quantities produced from each stream (gasifier produces more ash than ESP). The methods used in 2020 are more representative of the average ash bin content.
